titleStmt.title: SII 38.65: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 65. (A.R. No. 65 of 1912.) CHENNKOTTAPALLE, HINDUPUR TALUK, ANANTAPUR DISTRICT. On a rock south of the village.

p.hi: King: ⎯⎯ Year Śaka 15[39], Piṅgaḷa, Kārttika, śu. di. 5 = 20 November 1617 A.D.

summary.p: Damaged. Refers to the rule of a certain Veṅkaṭapati Nāyanayyavāru, son of the Rāya Daḷavāyi Kōnēṭi Nāyuḍu at Kalyāṇadurga and to the gift of the village Kottapalle to a certain Dāsappa-Nāyuḍu, son of Timmā-nāyuḍu, as a feudal tenure (pālēpaṭṭu). The latter seems to have induced a merchant of Chēlūru to dig a canal at Kottapalle.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . Avighnamastu . svasti śrī . jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavaru
ṣaṁbulu 1539 Agunēṭi piṁgaḷa saṁvatsara kā¨rtika śu 5 llu śrīmatu rāyadaḷavāyi kōnēṭi nāya
ni veṁkaṭapatināyanayyavāru kalyāṇadu¨rgaṁmuna pṛthvīpāṁbrājyaṁ śēyucucēṁnu
tiṁmānāyani komāruḍu dāsappanāyaniki pāḷepaṭṭugā manniṁccina kottapalle grāmaṁ nāya
kuḍai doratanaṁ śeśeveḷanu celūribulliseṭṭi koṁḍama koḍuku girini pilipiṁci
kottapallenu kāluva trovviṁmani mītō Āḍinamāṭa tappamuAni kavulu Ivvagānu grāma
dakṣiṇāna nūtanamugā bahuvyayaprayāsaṁ cellē koṁḍamāka
laṁtānu mōgāḷaṁ pūḍpiṁci kālva travviṁcinaṁduku Ākālvanu yaṁnipuṭla
maḍisāginā sāginaṁttamaḍikinni puṭṭiki yidduva maḍi lekhanu ta
ppaka naḍapagalavāramaniṁ yī mānyaṁ dānakrayabhōgyaṁgā
pāṣāṇa nidhi nikṣēpa Akṣiṇi Āgāmulunnu Ācaṁdrāka9mu
putra pautrapāraṁparyaṁtaṁ Anubhaviṁci ko
Ani dāsappanāya
śāsanaṁ . yī śāsanānaku
tappinavāru tamatallitaṁ
caṁpinapāpā
napōduru .
1. The following two lines are engraved above the record.

maḍikha 1 . nagariki kha 1 yaṟagiriki
daṁ kha . tavvaka naḍapagalavāramani
Digital edition of SII 38.65 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
